user_system_path: Issue #231 is the active work-state-purity seam. Issue #226 (rung 6 owner-path readiness) resumes after #231 is proven. Rung 7 remains forbidden until #226 is proven.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and the active issue before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #231 work-state purity. lib/signals/entity-trust.ts, lib/agents quarantine kill-switch, cron blocked-brief receipts, governance amendments, vitest suites for trust/demotion/salience. No UI, no auth, no payments, no marketing.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard UI, no start/try/pricing/login pages, no integrations, no acquisition agents, no Stripe, no middleware, no next.config changes.
required_browser_proof: Not required — core logic change, no UI path changed.
acceptance_condition: entity-trust.ts requires outbound evidence for trusted; personal class is sticky and salience-capped; nightly demotion sweep cleans legacy contaminated trusted; acquisition/growth agents default OFF; blocked brief emits a visible reason receipt; gate:continuity/lint/build green.
stop_condition: Stop when the #231 PR is merged and the GitHub receipt is posted to issue #231. Next seam: reactivate issue #226.

issue #226 is paused and resumes after #231 proves
issue #220 is completed — rung 5 live proof passed
rung 7 non-owner paid loop is forbidden until issue #226 is proven

next_command: Work issue #231: fix entity-trust.ts, add demotion sweep, quarantine acquisition agents, add blocked-brief receipts. Then reactivate issue #226.
